name: Study 2: CKD Progression Incidence by Sex — Both Treatment Arms
description: Sex-stratified CKD advancement incidence rates across lisinopril and amlodipine arms.

design_json.description: Incidence rate analysis of CKD advanced progression (Stages 4-5/dialysis) across both treatment arms (lisinopril and amlodipine), stratified by sex. Assesses potential effect modification by sex in antihypertensive treatment response.
